JUDGMENT DEBTOR DAMOON A. ARMAN APPEARING ON HIS OWN BEHALF. COURT FINDS JUDGMENT DEBTOR DAMOON A. ARMAN IN COMTEMPT OF COURT FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT PREVIOUS ORDER OF EXAMINATION AND FAILURE TO PROVIDE COURT WITH MEDICAL EXCUSE FOR PREVIOUS NON-APPEARANCE. COURT ORDERED PUNISHMENT FOR CONTEMPT OR COURT STAYED UNTIL NEXT HEARING DATE. COURT ORDERED JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO ANSWER ALL QUESTIONS OF QUESTIONNAIRE IN GOOD FAITH AND PROVIDE ANSWERS TO MR. WADE. COURT ORDERED JUDGMENT DEBTOR DAMOON A. ARMAN TO APPEAR IN THIS COURTROOM DEPT. 514, FOR FURTHER EXAMINATION. JUDGMENT CREDITOR REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION UNTIL NEXT HEARING DATE. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (514)

calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Apr-01-2014 Off Calendar

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Mar-12-2014 Continued To Apr-01-14 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: 2:43 pm

Appearances:
Wade S. Church, Esq for Judgment Creditor, Volume Distributor.
Judgment Debtor Damoon Arman is present.

Counsel for Judgment Creditor reports that the documents that have been received from Judgment Debtor are not satisfactory and relevant. Bank statements and documents re: the business have not been provided.
The Court questions the Judgment Debtor re: payment from work, cash, expenditures,bills, gym memerships and bank statements.
The Court orders the matter continued to April 01, 2014 at 2:00 pm. Judgment Debtor is ordered to appear.
The Court addresses the Judgment Debtor's failure to appear on February 11, 2014.
The Judgment Debtor has not submitted a Doctor's note for that date.
The Court orders $600 for reasonable attorney's fees added to the Judgment for the Judgment Debtor's failure to appear without good cause per CCP 708.170 (a)(2).
Counsel for Judgment Creditor to prepare an order to reflect today's ruling.
The Court will not impose a separate contempt finding for the same facts.
The Court suggest that Judgment Debtor cooperate fully with Judgment Creditor in submitting documents and to continue answering questions.

Matter is adjourned.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Feb-25-2014 Continued To Mar-11-14 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Feb-11-2014 Continued To Feb-25-14 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this for an Order of Examination.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings not reported.

Wade S. Church, Esq., appearing for Judgment Creditor.
No appearance by or on behalf Judgment Debtor DAMON A. AMAN, dba DOLLAR MARKET.
Donald E. Bloom, Esq., specially appearing for Arman Mohamed.

Court ordered Order of Examination as to Damon A. Aman continued to 2/25/204 at 2:00 PM, in Department 514.
Court made a telephone call to 949 3002302 this telephone number was provided to the court by the attorney representing Armand Mohamed (father of Judgment Debtor Damon A. Aman). Damon A. Aman answered the phone. The court asked Mr. Aman why he was not in court this afternoon as previously ordered by the court on January 23, 2014. Mr. Aman indicated to the court that he was sick today and was on his way to the Emergency Room.
The court ordered Mr. Aman to appear for a continued Order of Examination on 2/25/2014 at 2:00 PM, in Department 514. Court ordered Mr. Aman to provide an independent valid medical Proof of today's illnes from a Medical Doctor or Register Medical Nurse. Mr. Aman to provide Medical Excuse as to Why he should not be held in contempt of court for failure to appear today as ordered by the court. Mr. Amand started to argue with the court and hang up the the telephone. Mr. Church to submit a Declaraton re: Attorney's fees and Costs for today's appearace at Order of Examination.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jan-23-2014 Continued To Feb-11-14 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514
